title: UpCadhoc Card Order
description: How can I order a UpCadhoc gift certificate or card and track its status using the UpCadhoc management portal?
narrative: The user is looking for a clear, step‑by‑step guide that explains how to access the appropriate user or management space, place an order for a UpCadhoc gift certificate/card, and subsequently monitor the order’s progress. Relevant documents should describe the navigation to the "My Management Space" or "My User Space," the ordering workflow, and the tracking features available for UpCadhoc card orders.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe
description: Where can I find a traditional North African lamb tajine recipe with detailed preparation steps and ingredient list?
narrative: The user seeks authentic lamb tajine recipes that describe the traditional cooking method, list required spices, aromatics, and dried fruits, and provide step‑by‑step instructions. Relevant documents should mention the North African origin, the use of a conical earthenware tagine, the slow‑stewing technique, and include ingredient quantities and tips for achieving tender, flavorful meat.

title: Used SUV Search
description: Find used 4x4 SUVs priced under €20,000, gasoline‑powered, with mileage under 80,000 km, located within 30 km of Paris.
narrative: The user is looking for listings of second‑hand sport‑utility vehicles that satisfy all of the following constraints: 4x4 drivetrain, gasoline fuel, price ≤ 20,000 €, mileage ≤ 80,000 km, model year 2015‑2022, and seller location within a 30 km radius of Paris. Relevant documents are those that contain a usable advertisement meeting every listed criterion; partial matches that miss any of the requirements are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiette Recipe
description: Looking for a detailed, easy-to-follow recipe for veal paupiettes, preferably with cooking times, ingredients, and preparation steps.
narrative: The user wants a complete veal paupiette recipe that includes a list of ingredients, step‑by‑step instructions, and cooking/baking times. Relevant documents should provide the full recipe text, optional variations (e.g., with mushrooms or tomato sauce), and any helpful tips or photos that aid in preparing the dish quickly and successfully.

title: Car Tint Legal Limits
description: What are the French regulations on visible light transmission for automotive window tint films and which products satisfy those requirements?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative information on the legal constraints for tinting vehicle windows in France, including the minimum Visible Light Transmission (TLV) percentage required for front side glass (70% or higher), any exemptions for rear windows, and the prohibition of tint on the windshield. Relevant documents should describe the legislative text, the safety and visibility criteria, and indicate how self‑tinted solar film kits (pre‑cut or roll‑cut) can be verified as compliant with the 70% TLV rule.

title: Petit Bateau Women
description: What women's clothing and accessories does the Petit Bateau brand offer?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of Petit Bateau's women's apparel line. Relevant results should describe the categories of products (e.g., dresses, T‑shirts, sweaters, cardigans, trousers, jackets, swimwear, pajamas, underwear, accessories such as scarves, bags, headbands) and note any distinctive features like classic styles, seasonal collections, materials (e.g., organic cotton, waterproof wax), and the brand's casual‑chic aesthetic.

title: Renault Personnel Sale
description: What are the details of the sale of Renault personnel reported by ACR Renault?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the transaction involving Renault personnel as described by ACR Renault, including the nature of the sale, parties involved, dates, terms, and any financial or strategic implications. Relevant documents should explicitly discuss the sale of Renault personnel and provide substantive details rather than just a passing reference.

title: War School e‑book download
description: What file formats are offered for War School e‑books and how can I transfer them to my device?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive details on the e‑book formats (epub2, mobi, azw3) made available by War School, the process of receiving the three separate download links after purchase, and step‑by‑step guidance for moving the files onto various hardware (tablet, Kindle models, Kindle Fire, or a computer). Relevant information must include the compatible devices for each format, recommended software such as Calibre for reading on a computer, and any contact or troubleshooting instructions if download or transfer issues arise.

title: ARE Eligibility
description: What are the specific conditions a private employee must meet to be eligible for the French unemployment benefit (ARE)?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of all eligibility requirements for the ARE, including involuntary unemployment status, registration deadlines with Pôle emploi, minimum work periods, age considerations, treatment of training or suspension periods, and any special provisions such as reloadable rights or degressivity. Documents that detail these criteria and explain how each factor influences entitlement are relevant, while sources that only mention benefit amounts without eligibility rules are not.

title: Disclaimer Verification
description: How can I confirm that a notice I received about a disclaimed AXA life insurance contract is legitimate and not a fraud?
narrative: The user is trying to verify the authenticity of a communication from AXA regarding the disclaimer of a life or supplementary pension insurance contract. Relevant information must describe AXA's official procedures for handling disclaimed contracts, warning signs of fraudulent notices, recommended contact channels (e‑mail, telephone, client area), and any regulatory guidance (e.g., Eckert Act, Sapin II Act) that governs such communications. Documents that provide clear steps to validate the notice, how to retrieve or update client identifiers, and how to report suspected fraud are considered relevant.

title: Electric Car Purchase Incentives
description: What is the total cost after all subsidies, tax exemptions, and guarantees for buying a new battery‑electric vehicle in France in 2021?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information on the effective price of a new electric car in France, including list‑price ranges, all applicable government and regional aids (green bonus, conversion premium, retrofit premium, used‑EV bonus), exemption from registration tax, and battery warranty terms. Relevant documents must provide numeric examples of vehicle prices, the amount and eligibility criteria of each aid, how they combine to reduce the purchase price, and details on battery guarantees (duration, mileage, minimum capacity) so the user can assess the overall financial impact of acquiring an EV.

title: Diseased Tomato Safety
description: Are tomatoes infected with downy mildew or late blight safe to eat, store, or can, and what guidelines should be followed?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information on health risks, taste, and food‑safety recommendations for tomatoes affected by downy mildew or late blight, including whether they can be consumed fresh, stored, or used for home‑canning, and any relevant expert opinions or regulatory guidance.

title: Padre Pio Prophecy
description: Which recent posts or articles link Padre Pio’s prophecies to a pole shift, Nibiru‑type celestial events, and the three days of darkness?
narrative: The user seeks documents that explicitly associate Padre Pio’s prophetic statements with predictions of a planetary pole shift, an incoming Nibiru or similar planet/comet, and an ensuing three‑day period of darkness. Relevant material should name Padre Pio, describe the envisioned cosmic or geophysical catastrophes (pole displacement, eclipse or blockage of the Sun, meteor/dust rain), often provide a timeline (e.g., 2015‑2017), and compare these forecasts to other traditions such as Nostradamus, Hopi, Maya, or ancient biblical prophecies. Documents that merely mention any one of these elements without connecting them to Padre Pio’s prophecy are not considered relevant.

title: La Folle Access
description: Where can I legally watch the full movie "La Folle History of Space" online?
narrative: The user is looking for legitimate online sources that provide the complete, unabridged version of the film "La Folle History of Space" (or its French title "La Folle Histoire de l’espace"). Relevant results should identify official streaming platforms, rental or purchase services, and indicate availability in the desired language (VF or EN). Content that only references illegal downloads, torrents, or unauthorized free streams is not relevant. The answer should include details such as subscription requirements, regional availability, and whether the service offers a free trial or pay‑per‑view option.

title: Legends streaming
description: Where can I watch Le Bureau des Légendes (The Legends) online in French (VF) and with French subtitles (VOSTFR) for all seasons?
narrative: The user seeks legitimate streaming services that offer the French series Le Bureau des Légendes, covering seasons 1‑5, with the ability to watch in the original French audio (VF) and with French subtitles (VOSTFR). Relevant information should list platforms (e.g., subscription or free legal sites), indicate which seasons are available, and specify the language/subtitle options.

title: Allege Verb Meaning
description: What is the definition, conjugation and typical usage of the French verb “allege”?
narrative: The user wants an authoritative explanation of the verb “allege,” including its meaning (citing an authority or fact), synonyms, present‑tense conjugation, and example contexts. Relevant documents must provide a lexical definition, list of synonyms, and the verb’s conjugation patterns.

title: Rendez‑vous Access
description: How can I watch the French TV show “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu” and what is its broadcast schedule?
narrative: The user wants reliable details on when and where the program airs, including the channel, exact date and time, and how to stream it (e.g., via the France TV application or other online services). Relevant sources should mention the show’s premise, broadcast slot (June 14 at 9:10 PM), availability for live or on‑demand viewing, and any instructions for downloading or accessing the France TV app.

title: Vegetarian Truffle Crush
description: Is the frozen Black Truffle Potato Crush product compatible with a lacto‑ovo vegetarian diet and free of hidden non‑vegetarian allergens?
narrative: The user wants to determine whether the Black Truffle Potato Crush can be safely consumed by someone following a lacto‑ovo vegetarian diet. Relevant documents must explicitly state the product’s vegetarian status, list all ingredients, and disclose any allergens or processing aids that might introduce non‑vegetarian components (e.g., animal‑derived additives, cross‑contamination warnings). Reviews or marketing text that mention “suitable for vegetarians (vegetarian lacto ovo diet)” and the detailed ingredient/allergen list are considered relevant, while generic pricing or unrelated product listings are not.

title: Paris Event Venues
description: Which event venues in Paris have a comparable floor area, number of hosted events, and annual visitor count to Espace Charenton?
narrative: The user wants information on Parisian event spaces that are roughly 3000 m², host around 300 events per year, and attract about 200,000 visitors annually. Relevant documents should describe venues that match these size, event frequency, and attendance criteria.

title: Alpiq Offer Evaluation
description: How does Alpiq’s residential electricity plan compare to the regulated EDF tariff in terms of price, contract flexibility, and green energy options for a French household?
narrative: The user is looking to determine whether switching to Alpiq would be cheaper and more advantageous than remaining with the regulated EDF tariff. Relevant information includes Alpiq’s guarantee of a lower per‑kWh price than the regulated rate, example savings shown in customer cases, details of non‑binding contracts, options to customize the energy source (e.g., green, hydraulic, solar), tools for consumption analysis, and the ability to revert to regulated tariffs without penalty. Any document that provides pricing comparisons, contract terms, green‑energy guarantees, or customer‑service features should be considered relevant.

title: Kia PHEV Bonus
description: Which Kia plug‑in hybrid models are eligible for the maximum French electric purchase bonus and what are the required CO₂ and technical criteria?
narrative: The user is looking for current information on Kia plug‑in hybrid vehicles that meet the thresholds (e.g., < 20 g/km CO₂) to receive the full electric bonus in France. Relevant documents must mention specific Kia models (such as the Niro PHEV, Sportage PHEV, etc.), the emissions figures, and any recent policy changes that affect eligibility.

title: French Ancestry Myth
description: Did the ancestors of modern French people primarily descend from the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information on the historical and scholarly basis of the claim that the French are descended from the Gauls. Relevant material must explain the origin of the term “Gallic,” its use by Julius Caesar, the development of the Gaul‑France connection in 19th‑century textbooks, and subsequent historiographical critique. Sources that discuss the broader ethnic composition of France—including the Franks, Vikings, later immigration, and modern genetic or archaeological findings—are also pertinent. Documents that merely mention the term without contextual analysis, or that focus solely on contemporary French culture without historical depth, are not relevant.

title: Budget Faro Car Rental
description: What are the cheapest car rental options in Faro that include insurance and have no hidden toll fees for drivers aged 26‑65?
narrative: The user wants low‑cost car hire in Faro, Portugal, preferably around €6‑€12 per day, that provides basic insurance coverage, accepts standard payment methods without excessive deposits, and clearly states toll‑payment policies. Relevant results should mention the daily price, availability of insurance, driver‑age restrictions, and any notes about extra charges or toll handling.

title: Nantes Car Rental
description: What car and utility rental options, prices, age requirements, and self‑service features are available at ADA’s Nantes Gare Sud location?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about ADA’s rental services at the Nantes South train station, including the types of vehicles offered (passenger cars, vans, trucks), daily or promotional pricing, age restrictions (e.g., 21+ standard, 18+ low‑price offers), the availability of 24/7 self‑service/keyless mobile app access, and the possibility of one‑way rentals. Any document that describes these aspects of the Nantes Gare Sud agency is considered relevant.

title: Resistant Potato Varieties
description: Which potato cultivars are resistant to both common scab and the Colorado potato beetle, and what cultural practices should be used to maximize that resistance?
narrative: The user is looking for specific potato varieties that exhibit natural resistance to the bacterial disease common scab (both cork and raised forms) and to the Colorado potato beetle, as well as guidance on agronomic measures (e.g., crop rotation, soil preparation, companion planting) that support or enhance this resistance. Relevant documents should mention resistant cultivars such as Samba, describe their disease‑pest resistance traits, and outline complementary preventive practices.

title: Beaujolais Nouveau Discount
description: How can I obtain the 5 € purchase voucher for Beaujolais Nouveau and find details about its release date, price, and proper serving/storage?
narrative: The user is interested in acquiring the promotional 5 € voucher offered to newsletter subscribers for buying Beaujolais Nouveau. Relevant documents should explain the sign‑up process, voucher eligibility, and any required preference settings. In addition, the user wants factual information about Beaujolais Nouveau: the annual release date (the third Thursday of November), typical price range (5–10 € per bottle), recommended serving temperature (11‑13 °C), storage guidelines, and the wine’s AOC status. Documents that address any of these points—especially those that combine the promotional offer with the wine’s characteristics—are considered relevant.

title: Discount Boat Shoes
description: Where can I find discounted boat shoes for women in size 38‑40?
narrative: The user is looking for online listings of women's boat shoes that are on sale (e.g., 35%‑50% off) and available in European sizes 38 to 40. Relevant documents should mention the brand, price after discount, size options, any free‑delivery thresholds, and be from retailers that sell boat shoes such as Chaussmart.

title: Renault Electric Lease
description: Which Renault fully‑electric models can be leased for 37 months with a total cost below €20,000 after eco‑bonus and conversion‑premium deductions?
narrative: The user is planning a 37‑month long‑term lease (LLD) for a Renault electric vehicle and wants to know which models fit a budget of less than €20,000 when all applicable incentives are applied. Relevant information must include the model name, base price, lease monthly rate, first‑rent amount, the amount of the eco‑bonus and any conversion premium deducted, mileage limits, and any other conditions that affect the total cost. Documents that list pricing tables, lease terms, eco‑bonus values, and model specifications for vehicles such as the Twingo E‑Tech, Zoe‑Tech, Twizy E‑Tech, and others are considered pertinent.

title: Europcar Nantes Pricing
description: What is the average daily cost to rent a car from Europcar at Nantes Atlantic Airport and which factors (car category, rental length, discounts, fees) affect that price?
narrative: The user is looking for concrete information about the cost of renting a vehicle from the Europcar branch at Nantes Atlantic Airport, including the typical daily rate for standard categories, any additional charges (deposit, fuel, insurance), and how variables such as vehicle type, rental duration, loyalty discounts, and cancellation policies influence the final price. Relevant documents should mention average or specific daily rates, pricing tables, fee structures, discount programs, and policy details that affect the total cost.

title: Reunion Car Rental
description: What car rental services are available on Reunion Island, including pricing, insurance, and additional amenities?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information about car rental providers on Reunion Island, specifically details such as rates, unlimited mileage, insurance coverage, free baby seats, additional driver policies, and transfer options between the airport and accommodation. Documents that describe a rental company’s offerings, location (e.g., Saint‑Leu), free shuttle or taxi transfers, and any special services or partnership details are relevant.

title: Car Value Estimate
description: What is the current market price for a 2018 Mercedes‑Benz C 63 S with approximately 30,000 km on the Swiss market?
narrative: The user wants an accurate, up‑to‑date valuation of a specific used vehicle in Switzerland, taking into account factors such as model year, mileage, condition, and typical listing prices on AutoScout24. Relevant documents are those that provide market‑value estimates, recent listings of similar Mercedes‑Benz C 63 S cars, and pricing filters (e.g., year, mileage, brand) available on the platform.

title: Road Accident Compensation
description: How is compensation calculated for victims of road accidents in France, including the Badinter law provisions and the various injury assessment scales?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information on the French road‑accident compensation system. Relevant content must describe the Badinter law's automatic compensation rules, how medical experts evaluate injuries (AIPP/DFP, aesthetic and sexual prejudice, scoring 1‑7), how percentages are translated into monetary amounts, and the factors that influence the total award such as age, disability class, loss of earnings, and need for adaptations. Illustrative case examples of different injury severities and their corresponding compensation amounts are also considered relevant.

title: Accessible Concerts 2020
description: What concerts are scheduled at Arkéa Arena in 2020 that provide facilities for people with reduced mobility or other disabilities?
narrative: The user wants a list of 2020 events at the Arkéa Arena that explicitly mention accessibility accommodations (e.g., wheelchair access, assistance for the hearing impaired, dedicated contact lines). Relevant documents should include the event name, date, and any reference to services or information for disabled visitors.

title: Indre-et-Loire Jobs
description: Where can I find current job vacancies posted by local communities and public establishments in the Indre-et-Loire department?
narrative: The user is looking for up-to-date employment listings that are advertised through the Centre de Gestion d'Indre-et-Loire's Job Exchange. Relevant results should point to the public space of the Job Exchange where official job offers from all local municipalities and public institutions in Indre-et-Loire are displayed, and optionally guide the user on how to search, view details, and submit applications.

title: Tariff Changes 2022
description: What were the regulated electricity and natural gas tariff adjustments effective 1 February 2022 in France?
narrative: The user wants official information about the changes to regulated electricity tariffs (a 4% increase) and the status of regulated natural gas tariffs (no change) that took effect on 1 February 2022, as published by the National Energy Ombudsman. Relevant documents must mention the exact date, the percentage increase for electricity, and confirm that natural gas tariffs remained unchanged.

title: Desktop Promo Details
description: Which desktop computers (central units) are currently on promotion at Darty that include the €40 Microsoft 365 Family discount and free shipping, and are available for delivery to my postal code?
narrative: The user is looking for a list of Darty desktop (central unit) models that are part of the limited‑time promotion offering an immediate €40 discount when buying Microsoft 365 Family together with the device, and that also provide free shipping or free store withdrawal. Relevant results must mention the specific promotion, show the desktop’s specifications (e.g., CPU, RAM, storage, graphics), indicate the promotional price or discount, and provide information about product availability based on a postal code (or a way to check it). Documents that only mention laptops, tablets, accessories, or promotions without the Microsoft 365 discount are not relevant.

title: Medium Format Selection
description: What factors should I consider when selecting a medium format film camera for landscape photography?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive advice on choosing a medium format silver camera that works well for landscape work, including considerations of camera bodies, lens choices, film formats, accessories, and practical tips from experienced users. Relevant documents are those that discuss medium format cameras, selection advice, lenses, film types, and related user experiences. Posts about unrelated categories (e.g., digital cameras, instant cameras, forum administration, or non‑photography topics) are not relevant.

title: Leek Quiche Recipe
description: What is a complete recipe for a leek and lardon quiche, including ingredients, quantities, and step‑by‑step instructions?
narrative: The user wants a full cooking guide for a leek quiche with lardons. Relevant material should list all necessary ingredients (leeks, lardons, eggs, cream, milk, flour or dough, Gruyère, etc.), provide exact measurements, describe preparation steps (e.g., steaming leeks, sautéing lardons, mixing batter), specify cooking times and temperature, and include any optional tips or variations. Only documents that contain a complete, ready‑to‑cook recipe satisfy this need.

title: Temporary Road Signs
description: What are the meanings, purposes, and legal requirements of temporary traffic signs used on highways?
narrative: The user wants detailed information about temporary road signs, including their definitions, visual characteristics, situations in which they are employed, and any associated legal obligations for drivers. Relevant documents should specifically discuss temporary signs within the highway code and explain how they differ from permanent hazard, prohibition, and obligation signs.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility requirements and benefits of the French unemployment mobility assistance program?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on who can receive mobility assistance as a registered jobseeker in France, including conditions such as unemployment benefit level, distance to interview, type and duration of contract, and excluded situations, as well as details on the monetary limits for travel, accommodation, meals, and SNCF vouchers. Relevant documents must clearly state these criteria, the application timeline, and the scope of reimbursements.

title: SFR Client Login
description: What are the steps to access the SFR client area to view invoices and manage my LICO account?
narrative: The user wants a clear, step‑by‑step guide for signing into the SFR customer portal, including how to recover a forgotten username or password, locate the invoice section, and use the LICO management features. Relevant documents must describe the login process, account recovery, and navigation to billing and LICO tools.

title: French Jura Oil Lamps
description: What are the characteristics, history, and collector value of Ets Gaudard A.&P. oil lamps from the Morbier region in Jura, France?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on the artisanal oil lamps produced by Ets Gaudard A.&P. for the Morbier market in the Jura region. Relevant documents should describe the lamps' design features, materials, production dates, the maker’s background, and any provenance or valuation data useful to collectors or historians.

title: Affordable Madeira Car
description: What are the cheapest car‑rental options on Madeira Island that include full‑coverage insurance and transparent, no‑fee pick‑up/drop‑off services?
narrative: The user is looking for low‑cost rental cars in Madeira that provide all‑risk (full) insurance without a deductible and have clear, upfront pricing with no hidden charges. Relevant results should mention specific daily or weekly rates, the inclusion of full coverage, free or low‑cost delivery to locations such as the airport or hotels, and any conditions (e.g., minimum rental period for free delivery). Information about vehicle categories, mileage limits, and customer experiences confirming the transparency of fees is also pertinent.

title: New Potato Sauté
description: What are the best techniques and step‑by‑step instructions for sautéing new (early) potatoes (shot) so they stay intact, become crisp on the outside and tender inside?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed recipe and cooking guidance for preparing new or "shot" potatoes by sautéing (rissolée). Relevant documents must describe the characteristics of new potatoes, handling tips to preserve their delicate skin, recommended butter or oil ratios, heat levels, timing (including the three cooking stages), and any optional variations. Answers that merely list ingredients without procedural detail, or that discuss mature potatoes, are not relevant.

title: APRE Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility requirements, application process, and possible benefits for receiving personalized back‑to‑work assistance (APRE) as an RSA beneficiary in France?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on who can qualify for APRE, the conditions that must be met (RSA status, income limits, employment or training situation), required documentation, departmental variations, and the limits on financial aid. Relevant documents are those that detail the purpose of APRE, beneficiary criteria, steps to apply, types of support covered, and the role of local councils and CAF in granting the assistance.
